title: hw3_repo: ID scheme and traceability conventions
content:
## HW3 Traceability ID Scheme

### ID Prefixes
| Prefix | Type | Owner | Count |
|---|---|---|---|
| OBJ-xx | Mid-level objectives | Agent 1 | 7 (OBJ-01–07) |
| REQ-xx.xx | Functional requirements | Agent 1 | 43 across 7 OBJs |
| TASK-xx.xx | Low-level tasks | Agent 1 | 34 across 7 groups |
| EDGE-xx | Edge cases | Agent 1 | 22 (EDGE-01–22) |
| NFR-xx | Non-functional requirements | Agent 2 | 21 (NFR-01–21) |
| COMP-xx | Compliance assumptions | Agent 2 | 12 (COMP-01–12) |
| SEC-xx | Security requirements | Agent 2 | 12 (SEC-01–12) |
| AUD-xx | Audit event types | Agent 2 | 29 (AUD-01–29) |
| AUD-RET-xx | Audit retention rules | Agent 2 | 6 (AUD-RET-01–06) |
| FAIL-xx | Failure modes | Agent 2 | 10 (FAIL-01–10) |
| FRAUD-xx | Fraud/abuse edge cases | Agent 2 | 9 (FRAUD-01–09) |
| OQ-xx | Open questions | Agent 1/2 | 8 (OQ-01–08) |

### Linking Rules
- Every REQ cites exactly one OBJ parent
- Every TASK cites exactly one REQ parent
- Every EDGE cites at least one TASK it affects
- NFR entries cross-referenced in TASK and TEST where they impose constraints

### Subsystems
| ID | Name |
|---|---|
| SYS-01 | Virtual Card Creation |
| SYS-02 | Card Freeze and Unfreeze |
| SYS-03 | Spending Controls |
| SYS-04 | Transaction Visibility |
| SYS-05 | Audit and Compliance Operations |
